chapter_title.en: Annihilation of the Kharijites, mischief mongering of the Umayyads, vastness of his own knowledge

text: ومن خطبة له (عليه السلام) وفيها ينبِّه أَمير المؤمنين على فضله وعلمه ويبيّن فتنة بني أُميّة

en.sayed-ali-raza: About the annihilation of the Khārijites, the mischief mongering of Umayyads and the vastness of his own knowledge [1]
